summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TUB platform with real DB-backed KPIs - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly with actual data
passed_tests: Backend: All 12 API endpoints (100% success rate)
Real data overview: 24 total non-conformities (12 acertos + 5 trocas + 7 faltas)
Dynamic KPIs calculated from DB with correct real values
Date range filtering working (returns 4 records for 2024-01-15 to 2024-01-17)
CSV upload endpoint validates file requirements properly
Data retrieval endpoints return correct record structure
Upload stats endpoint shows accurate counts per area
Frontend: Homepage loads with real overview stats (24 total)
All 3 area pages (Acertos, Trocas, Faltas) display 4 KPI cards with real data
Import page shows correct record counts per area
Date range filter: calendar popover opens and applies filters
Upload modals: open/close correctly with drag-drop area and format examples
CSV upload end-to-end: successfully uploaded 2 test records, total updated from 24 to 26
Real-time UI updates after data import
All interactive buttons clickable and functional
Delete buttons enabled when data exists
Navigation between all pages working correctly
